description: A CMDB integration initiative requires that the primary OpManager server be tagged with financial and ownership metadata. A policy document is on the desktop at ~/Desktop/asset_classification_policy.txt. Read the policy, create the required Device Template ('Management-Appliance') and Custom Fields ('CostCenter', 'AssetOwner', 'ComplianceScope'), and apply them to the localhost device (127.0.0.1) with the exact values specified. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
